productDisplayName: Converse Men CT AS 17 NYC White Shoes
description: Since their inception, Chuck Taylor All Star sneakers have been worn by athletes, rockstars, experimenters and visionaries alike. And now, you're getting a blank canvas with these optical white high top sneakers with contrasting red lacing - paint them yourself and put your brightest foot forward this season!UpperCanvas upper for easy maintenance and durabilityUpper with All Star patch detailing beside the ankle and graffiti on the other side of the ankleMonochrome upper with scarlet red contrast lacing for maximum styleCarbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper footLong canvas tongue for added comfort and snug  FitLace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durabilityEyelets on the lateral side for ventilationMidsoleMidsole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioningOutsoleVulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and tractionDiamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugs and grooves on the toe and heel region and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrainsshoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
